zh.lifeSummary: Grace Freyer於1627年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾波斯姆斯。她於1648年7月4日與William J Tucker在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克易斯萊斯 本 阿爾斯結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1674年在美國緬因州約克享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Grace Freyer于1627年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾波斯姆斯。她于1648年7月4日与William J Tucker在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克易斯萊斯 本 阿爾斯结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1674年在美国缅因州約克享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: Freyer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Hans, Heinz, Klaus, Rainer, Uwe, Wolfang.

variants.name: Freier
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Fritz, Hartmut.
status name of the feudal system denoting a free man, as opposed to a bondsman, from an inflected form of Middle High German vrī ‘free’.

nameMeanings.name: Grace
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the abstract noun (via Old French, from Latin gratia), this name occurs occasionally in the 15th century, and by the 1540s was among the most popular girls' names in some parishes. It has always been particularly popular in Scotland and northern England (borne, for example, by Grace Darling , the lighthouse keeper's daughter whose heroism in 1838 , saving sailors in a storm, caught the popular imagination). In more recent times it was famous as the name of the actress Grace Kelly ( 1928–82 ), who became Princess Grace of Monaco. In Ireland it is used as an Anglicized form of Gráinne .

historicEvents.title: Massachusetts Colony Gains Control of New Hampshire
historicEvents.description: In 1641, Massachusetts gained control of New Hampshire until 1679 when New Hampshire became a separate royal colony.

historicEvents.title: First Recorded Slave in Portsmouth
historicEvents.description: In 1645, an African American man taken from Guinea was captured and brought to New Hampshire, he would be counted as the first African American slave in New Hampshire.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Black Heritage Trail in New Hampshire- Our African Heritage

en.lifeSummary: Grace Freyer was born in 1627, in Portsmouth, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. She married William J Tucker on 4 July 1648, in Isles of Shoals, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1674, in York, Maine, United States, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Grace Freyer est née en 1627, à Portsmouth, New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique. Elle a épousé William J Tucker le 4 juillet 1648, à Isles of Shoals, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1674, à York, Maine, États-Unis, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Grace Freyer wurde 1627 in Portsmouth, New Hampshire, British Colonial America geboren. Sie hat am 4. Juli 1648 in Isles of Shoals, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America William J Tucker geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1674 im Alter von 47 Jahren in York, Maine, Vereinigte Staaten.

it.lifeSummary: Grace Freyer è nata il nel 1627 nel Portsmouth, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Lei sposato William J Tucker il 4 luglio 1648, nel Isles of Shoals, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1674, nel York, Maine, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Grace Freyerは1627年にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアポルトスモウスで生まれた。1648年7月4日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーヨークイスレス オフ ショアルズでWilliam J Tuckerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1674年にアメリカ合衆国メイン州ヨークで47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Grace Freyer(은)는 1627년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 포츠모우스에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1648년 7월 4일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 요르크 이슬레스 프 쇼스에서 William J Tucker(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1674년 미국 메인 주 요르크에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Grace Freyer nasceu em 1627, em Portsmouth, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Ela casou-se com William J Tucker em 4 de julho de 1648, em Isles of Shoals, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1674, em York, Maine, Estados Unidos da América, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Grace Freyer родилась в 1627 г. в местности порцмоут, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William J Tucker 4 июля 1648 г. в местности ислесь оф шоалс, ерк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1674 г. в местности ерк, Мэн, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Grace Freyer nació en 1627, en Portsmouth, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Se casó con William J Tucker el 4 de julio de 1648, en Isles of Shoals, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1674, en York, Maine, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 47 años.
